name: daily-tests
message:
Run daily tests.

Command: uv run pytest tests/ -v

If any tests fail:
1. Investigate and fix the root cause
2. Re-run to confirm all tests pass
3. git commit & push

name: daily-security
message:
Daily security check.

1. Scan for hardcoded secrets:
   grep -rE '(api[_-]?key|api[_-]?secret|password|token|private[_-]?key)' --include='*.py' --include='*.html' --include='*.js' --include='*.sh' -i
2. Check public files for leaked secrets:
   grep -rE '(xai-|sk-|ghp_|gho_|sk-ant-)' docs/ -i
3. Verify .env files are not tracked:
   git ls-files | grep -i '.env'

Fix any issues found, then git commit & push.

name: daily-cleanup
message:
Daily cleanup check.

Check for:
- Unnecessary temporary files
- Project root clutter
- Overflowing log files

Clean up as needed.

name: weekly-cleanup
message:
Weekly cleanup check (every Sunday).

Review:
1. Project root for stray files
2. Experiment folders for abandoned work
3. Memory file sizes (working_memory.md, todo.md)
4. Tool inventory and documentation

Report findings. Do not delete without confirmation.

name: weekly-maintenance
message:
Weekly free-form maintenance (every Wednesday).

Look around the repository and fix anything that catches your eye:
- Small improvements
- Documentation errors
- Code issues
- Folder clutter

Report what you found and fixed.
